description_long: This is a modern two-story brick house with a flat, dark gray gable roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large glass doors and windows, a prominent garage with a flat overhang, and a small landscaped garden bordered by white flowers. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn with several bushes and trees, and a paved driveway leads up to the garage and main entrance. The rear of the house is simpler, with smaller windows and a secondary glass door opening onto the backyard. The side elevations show minimal ornamentation, with a few horizontal windows and a consistent brick exterior. The overall appearance is contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines, open spaces, and functional landscaping.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat gable roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped front and back yards. The design is clean and geometric, with a focus on open spaces and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, garage, landscaped garden, and driveway.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the garage side, side windows, and the transition from the driveway to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary glass door, small windows, and a large expanse of lawn.
description_view_3: Left-side view with a balcony above a large window, more landscaping, and a clear view of the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows and smaller side/rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, flat overhang, and landscaped approach with a paved driveway and flower beds.
